sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current agent position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
# Find agent (black dot that is child of a room)
agent_pos = None
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['children']:
        for child_id in n['children']:
            child = [c for c in seg['nodes'] if c['id']==child_id][0]
            if child['color'] == 'B' and child['pixels'] == 1:
                agent_pos = child['boundary'][0]
                print(f"Agent at {agent_pos}, inside node {n['id']} (color={n['color']})")

# Try RIGHT
action(['RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['children']:
        for child_id in n['children']:
            child = [c for c in seg['nodes'] if c['id']==child_id][0]
            if child['color'] == 'B' and child['pixels'] == 1:
                print(f"After RIGHT: Agent at {child['boundary'][0]}, inside node {n['id']} (color={n['color']})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
